intro.title: How I can help
intro.description: End‑to‑end software development—from concept to delivery and maintenance. I work with mainstream technologies to build modern, performant, maintainable applications.

services.title: Web development
services.description: Responsive, accessible, optimized sites and apps. Modern frameworks like Vue and React for fast interfaces and a great user experience.

services.title: System maintenance
services.description: Bug fixes, legacy refactors, and continuous evolution of production systems—stability and gradual improvement without stopping the business.

services.title: Application deployment
services.description: Staging and production environments, CI/CD pipelines, containers (Docker), and cloud setups to go live safely and scale.

services.title: Interface design
services.description: Prototyping and UI design aligned with your product. Figma for flows, components, and visual identity before development.

services.title: APIs & integrations
services.description: REST or GraphQL APIs and system integrations. Clear documentation and solid practices for reliable communication between services.
